detailedDescription:
32GB of DDR3 across four slots.
High-capacity config for older workstations handling large datasets or VMs.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 32GB
Generation: DDR3
Bandwidth: Up to 14.9 GB/s per channel
Voltage: 1.5V (1.35V for DDR3L)
Slots: 4 x 8GB (dual-channel)
ECC Support: No (standard) / Yes (server variants)
Compatible Sockets: LGA1155, LGA1150, AM3, AM3+
